description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: clang-format-check, test, and user-integration. Use the saschpe/clang Docker image for the clang-format-check job, which runs `apk update && apk add bash git`, then `/bin/bash ./ci/ci_clang_format_check.sh`, and finally `echo clang-format was applied ok`, and runs on the linux/docker tags. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `./ci/ci_test.sh` and `echo finished ok`, runs on linux/docker tags, and declares llvm-versions 4.0.0,5.0.0,6.0.0 with toolchains clang40-x86,clang50-x86,clang60-x86,gcc5-armv7,gcc5-x86,gcc6-armv7,gcc6-x86,gcc7-armv7,gcc7-x86,gcc8-armv7,gcc8-x86. Add a user-integration job in the user-integration stage that runs `./ci/ci_user_integration.sh` and `echo finished ok`, also on linux/docker tags, with the same llvm-versions and toolchains. Define a top‑level docker configuration with name tinyrefl and repo manu343726 for later image publishing.
